title: What's New in Billinox — Spring 2026
excerpt: Multi-currency, new templates, and a faster sync engine. Here's the rundown.
content:
## Multi-currency, finally

Issue invoices in 30+ currencies with live exchange rate snapshots locked at issue time.

## Six new templates

Fresh, minimal designs ranging from agency-formal to playful retail.

## Faster sync engine

3x faster reconciliation for accounts with thousands of records.
author: Billinox Team
